testing123

Woaw first blog post of my life...!!!! Ok confession time. I've been intentionally delaying the making of this page because I was struggling with what I wanted to do with it tbh...I'm a fairly private person which is pretty ironic considering how much I used to overshare when I was a stupid ass kid. However, I think there is still a part of me that desires to connect with others, whether it be through my art or these shoddy blog posts, so maybe this site was a byproduct of that. I really don't know how much I’ll use this part of my site, but that's the beauty of a personal website!! I can just do whateva without a care in the world. I think that is also why I've been having so much fun learning to code. There's no expectations I hold against myself when it comes to making any of these pages and it is so damn freeing.
